name: AatendenceAPP
description: This application developed using Java, Kotlin, and XML that enables efficient student/employee attendance tracking with a simple and user-friendly interface. It has admin and faculty login. Faculty only has access of attendence while Admin can update, delete and add students and faculty as well.

name: Agentic-Legal-Assistant-Multi-Tool-AI-Agent-with-Gemini-2.5-Flash
description: Autonomous AI agent built with the Google Gen AI SDK and Gemini 2.5 Flash. This Colab-optimized project features system-driven personas, automated function calling, and iterative response loops. It provides a modular foundation for specialized agents, such as legal assistants, capable of executing code and grounding answers in real-time data.

name: AI-powered-Podcast-Agent
description: Build Your Own AI Agent: A comprehensive Google Colab tutorial using LangGraph and Gemini to create an autonomous Research & Podcast agent. Includes automated web research, iterative content refinement (Critique loops), and Text-to-Speech (TTS) integration.

name: AppointmentBookingApp
description: This is a professional Android application designed to streamline the process of scheduling services between administrators and users. Built with Kotlin and Firebase, it provides a real-time, synchronized experience for managing appointments.

name: crazy-closers
description: Crazy Closers (Genius Leads LLC) — Brand Gateway lead-gen & compliance site

name: GetAuto
description: 🚗 GetAuto — Offline-first vehicle rental marketplace PWA. Email-OTP auth, vendor/customer roles, car/bike/bus listings, wishlist, ratings & vendor dashboard. Built with React + Vite + Dexie.js + Tailwind.

name: kareemiya-site
description: Kareemiya — AI-powered BPO & career platform (Motive Dark theme)

name: Legal-AI-Assistant
description: AI-powered legal assistant for contract analysis, case law research, and document summarization. Built with [Grok], optimized for Google Colab with integrated RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation).

name: MarketForge
description: Creating Marketing Assets using Gemini 2.0 using GoogleCloudPlatform

name: Prioriti
description: A minimalist, offline-first Progressive Web App (PWA) that redefines task management by calculating task weight through importance and difficulty scores, built with a system-adaptive "Komma" inspired UI.

name: referralclose-llc-marketplace
description: ReferralClose LLC — Home Service Marketplace. Premium homeowner lead-gen platform connecting verified local contractors with high-intent homeowners.

name: ultd-llc-real-estate
description: Temporary deploy of UNLT LLC real estate site

name: YoungDev-Intern-C--Tasks
description: A collection of C++ projects developed during my internship at YoungDev Interns. Features a tiered progression from fundamental logic building to Intermediate Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) and Advanced Data Structures & Algorithms (DSA) implementations.
